subject: calculus_1
title_he: Ч—Ч©Ч‘Ч•Чҹ Ч“ЧҷЧӨЧЁЧ ЧҰЧҷЧҗЧңЧҷ 1 (104031) вҖ” ЧһЧ‘Ч—Чҹ ЧһЧ“Ч•ЧһЧ”
instructions_en: Technion-style Calculus 1 exam. Answer all 6 questions. Show complete proofs and justifications. No calculator.
instructions_he: ЧһЧ‘Ч—Чҹ Ч‘ЧЎЧ’Ч Ч•Чҹ ЧҳЧӣЧ ЧҷЧ•Чҹ. ЧўЧ Ч” ЧўЧң ЧӣЧң 6 Ч”Ч©ЧҗЧңЧ•ЧӘ. Ч”ЧҰЧ’ Ч”Ч•ЧӣЧ—Ч•ЧӘ ЧһЧңЧҗЧ•ЧӘ. ЧңЧңЧҗ ЧһЧ—Ч©Ч‘Ч•Чҹ.

sections.instructions_en: Answer all questions. Point values shown per question.
sections.instructions_he: ЧўЧ Ч” ЧўЧң ЧӣЧң Ч”Ч©ЧҗЧңЧ•ЧӘ. Ч ЧҷЧ§Ч•Ч“ ЧһЧҰЧ•ЧҷЧҹ ЧңЧӣЧң Ч©ЧҗЧңЧ”.

expected_steps_en: L'HГҙpital or compare growth rates вҶ’ 0

questions.body_en:
Let $f(x) = x^3 - 3x^2 - 9x + 5$.

(a) Find $f'(x)$ and all critical points on $\mathbb{R}$.
(b) Intervals of increase/decrease; classify each critical point.
(c) Find $\lim_{x\to\infty} f(x)$ and $\lim_{x\to -\infty} f(x)$.
(d) Sketch $f$ with all asymptotes and key points.
questions.body_he:
ЧӘЧ”Чҗ $f(x) = x^3 - 3x^2 - 9x + 5$.

(Чҗ) Ч Ч’Ч–ЧЁЧӘ Ч•Ч Ч§Ч•Ч“Ч•ЧӘ Ч§ЧҷЧҰЧ•Чҹ.
(Ч‘) ЧўЧңЧҷЧҷЧ”/ЧҷЧЁЧҷЧ“Ч”.
(Ч’) Ч’Ч‘Ч•ЧңЧ•ЧӘ Ч‘ЧҗЧҷЧ ЧЎЧ•ЧЈ.
(Ч“) ЧЎЧ§ЧҷЧҰЧ”.
questions.sample_solution_en: Critical: $x=-1$ local max, $x=3$ local min. $f\to\pm\infty$. Inflection at $x=1$.

questions.body_en:
Sequences. Define $a_1 = 2$ and $a_{n+1} = \sqrt{2 + a_n}$ for $n \ge 1$.

(a) Prove by induction that $a_n < 2$ for all $n$.
(b) Prove $(a_n)$ is increasing.
(c) Conclude that $(a_n)$ converges and find its limit.
questions.body_he:
ЧЎЧ“ЧЁЧ”: $a_1=2$, $a_{n+1}=\sqrt{2+a_n}$.

(Чҗ) Ч”Ч•ЧӣЧ— $a_n<2$.
(Ч‘) Ч”Ч•ЧӣЧ— ЧўЧ•ЧңЧ”.
(Ч’) Ч”ЧӘЧӣЧ ЧЎЧ•ЧӘ Ч•Ч’Ч‘Ч•Чң.

questions.body_en:
Mean Value Theorem.

Let $f$ be continuous on $[1,4]$ and differentiable on $(1,4)$ with $f(1)=5$, $f(4)=14$.

(a) State the Mean Value Theorem.
(b) Find a value $c \in (1,4)$ guaranteed by MVT.
(c) If $f'(x) \ge 2$ for all $x \in (1,4)$, prove $f(4) - f(1) \ge 6$.
questions.body_he:
ЧһЧ©ЧӨЧҳ Ч”ЧўЧЁЧҡ Ч”ЧһЧһЧ•ЧҰЧў.

$f$ ЧЁЧҰЧҷЧӨЧ” Ч‘-$[1,4]$, Ч’Ч–ЧҷЧЁЧ” Ч‘-$(1,4)$, $f(1)=5$, $f(4)=14$.

(Чҗ) Ч ЧҷЧЎЧ•Ч— MVT.
(Ч‘) ЧһЧҰЧҗ $c$.
(Ч’) Ч”Ч•ЧӣЧ— $f(4)-f(1)\ge 6$ ЧҗЧқ $f'\ge 2$.
expected_steps_en: Integrate or use MVT with lower bound on $f'$

questions.body_en:
$\varepsilon$-$\delta$ proof.

Prove using the definition: $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 2} (5x - 3) = 7$.

Your proof must explicitly: state the goal $|f(x)-7|<\varepsilon$, derive $|x-2|$ bound, choose $\delta$, and verify.
questions.body_he:
Ч”Ч•ЧӣЧ—Ч” $\varepsilon$-$\delta$:

$\lim_{x\to 2}(5x-3)=7$.

Ч ЧҷЧЎЧ•Ч— ЧһЧңЧҗ: ЧһЧҳЧЁЧ”, Ч‘Ч—ЧҷЧЁЧӘ $\delta$, ЧҗЧҷЧһЧ•ЧӘ.
